name: Chocolate Yogurt Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar, flour, and salt until well combined; press into a greased springform pan.
3. Bake crust for 10 minutes or until lightly golden.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
5. Gradually add confectioners' sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract to the cream cheese mixture.
6. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in egg yolk and milk.
7. Pour filling into baked crust.
8. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set but slightly jiggly.
9. Let cool completely before refrigerating for at least 4 hours.
